projects.name: LearnBetter
projects.description: A full-stack learning platform designed to enhance the digital learning experience through scalable architecture, cloud infrastructure, and responsive user interfaces.
responsibilities: Developed frontend and backend modules using Next.js and Node.js.
Implemented MySQL database operations and API integrations.
Worked with AWS EC2 for deployment and hosting.
Integrated Amazon S3 for file storage and management.
Performed testing, debugging, and deployment activities.

projects.name: Arthshastra
projects.description: An AI-powered digital knowledge platform utilizing Gemini API and structured JSON workflows to generate and manage educational content based on ancient Indian knowledge systems.
responsibilities: Developed frontend modules for books, chapters, and shloka navigation.
Built content rendering interfaces using Next.js.
Created Gemini API-powered tools for automated JSON dataset generation.
Structured educational content into standardized datasets.
Contributed to testing and platform enhancements.

projects.name: Sahyadri Rural Connect
projects.description: A social leadership platform connecting students with experiential learning opportunities through winter camps, rural immersion programs, and grassroots initiatives.
responsibilities: Implemented content restructuring and UI improvements.
Collaborated on feature development and deployment.

projects.name: Tech4Bharat
projects.description: A skill-development and educational initiative website focused on empowering students through workshops in technology, public policy, and national security.
responsibilities: Contributed to website redesign and modernization.

projects.name: Humora Technology
projects.description: An enterprise-scale corporate website consisting of over 70 responsive pages showcasing services, products, research initiatives, and technology solutions.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained multiple website pages.

projects.name: PathReco AI
projects.description: An AI-powered domain-specific course recommendation system that provides personalized learning pathways using Sentence-BERT embeddings and knowledge graphs.
responsibilities: Implemented semantic similarity matching using Sentence-BERT.
Built knowledge graph relationships between domains, skills, and courses.

projects.name: Blog Aura
projects.description: A multilingual blogging platform focused on providing users with a clean and engaging content-sharing experience.

projects.name: KKNOTES BSCCS
projects.description: An educational mobile application providing B.Sc. Computer Science students with semester-wise notes, academic resources, and study materials.
responsibilities: Designed and developed the Android application.
Built user-friendly navigation and resource management features.

projects.name: Block Banger
projects.description: A 3D adventure platformer game featuring multiple levels, enemies, collectibles, scoring systems, and immersive gameplay mechanics.
responsibilities: Implemented player controls and enemy systems.

projects.name: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
projects.description: A classic Tic-Tac-Toe game built using vanilla JavaScript featuring responsive design and game state management.
responsibilities: Developed game logic and win detection algorithms.

projects.name: KKMusic
projects.description: A browser-based music player featuring interactive controls, playlists, and a responsive listening experience.
responsibilities: Built responsive layouts and user interactions.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern developer portfolio showcasing projects, experience, research publications, certifications, achievements, and technical skills with premium responsive design.
responsibilities: Designed and developed the complete website.
Implemented dark and light theme support.
Built responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
